name: Analog horror survival  | The humanoids
description:
"This is an emergency warning: To every resident of the state of Rivermont, suspicious individuals have been spotted in your area. The entities, look like us. They have been spotted eating people and killing them in ways eyes should not see. Please wait until for further insctructions on how to avoid these humanoids."

Disclaimer: Everything in this AI bot analog horror adventure is completely fictional, the characters, the names, the events, and etc have no refrence to real things and if they do it has been unintentional.

Trigger warning: Gore, violence, monsters, death, abuse, etc.

How to customize you and your partner in this rp:

※Persona

※Chat memory

I also recomand using the style of writing in the first message for your own messages, it helps the AI to not forget about the day counter and stuff on top of the messages. (You simply can input a message and then use the enhance msg thing as well.)
